description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow should have two jobs: tests and coverage. The tests job should run on multiple Python versions (2.7, 3.7-3.10) on an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, running tox targets, and uploading coverage data. The coverage job should run on ubuntu-20.04, depend on the tests job, download coverage data, combine coverage reports, and upload an HTML report if the coverage is less than 100%.
